source.title: PDD Holdings Quarterly Earnings Releases 2024-2025 - Cost Structure Analysis

extractions.claim: PDD's gross margin is ~57% in 9M 2025, down from ~61% in FY2024, reflecting Temu fulfillment costs

verification.verifier_notes: Revenue and COGS from earnings releases. Gross margin compression driven by higher fulfillment, bandwidth, and payment processing fees.

extractions.claim: Sales & marketing is PDD's largest operating expense, consuming ~30% of revenue in 9M 2025
extractions.evidence: S&M expenses: Q1 2025: RMB 33,403M (34.9% of rev). Q2 2025: RMB 27,210M (26.2%). Q3 2025: RMB 30,323M (28.0%). 9M 2025: RMB 90,936M (29.5%). FY2024: RMB 93,404M (23.7%). The sharp increase in S&M as % of revenue reflects Temu user acquisition and Pinduoduo merchant subsidies.

extractions.claim: R&D spending is modest at ~4% of revenue, reflecting PDD's lean engineering approach
extractions.evidence: R&D expenses: 9M 2025: RMB 11,501M (3.7% of revenue). FY2024: RMB 13,117M (3.3%). This is low compared to Alibaba (~7%) and JD (~3.5%), reflecting PDD's focus on algorithm efficiency over infrastructure breadth.

verification.verifier_notes: PDD R&D from earnings releases. Alibaba/JD comparisons are approximate from prior knowledge.
